policy_justification: Phase 23 integrates runtime safety gating and Tenderly simulation while maintaining a shadow-only posture. Multi-route family (0.03 ETH bucket) is the primary target for future canary deployment. Direct routes remain blocked for safety until further evidence is gathered.
constraints: Live mode (canary_live_mode_enabled) is FALSE by default
Economics model uses 5 Gwei L2 gas approximation (L1 fees NOT included)
Tenderly simulation acts as an additional safety preflight
